EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IMSegmentation3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to additional linear referencing operations on polylines.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("58AD0D5D-393D-44AA-9797-6E50D06ED524")]
public interface IMSegmentation3 : IMSegmentation2, IMSegmentation, IMCollection

double

esriMMonotonicEnum MMonotonic { get; }

Property Value

esriMMonotonicEnum

MMonotonicity

A combination of esriMonotinicityEnum values that describes all trends in M values over the length of the curve.

int MMonotonicity { get; }

int
